description_long: This chaise features a sturdy wooden frame with a natural finish, supporting a thick, rectangular seat cushion and a matching backrest cushion. The backrest is solid and extends the full width of the seat, providing ample support. Both the seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, light-colored fabric, creating a clean and modern appearance. The sides of the chaise are open, with the wooden frame forming a decorative lattice pattern on each end. The legs are integrated into the frame, short and robust, ensuring stability. This piece is designed for comfort and style, suitable for outdoor or indoor urban environments such as parks, patios, or communal spaces.
description: A modern wooden chaise with a light fabric seat and backrest, featuring a decorative lattice frame and open sides. The design is clean, sturdy, and comfortable, ideal for urban relaxation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat and backrest cushions, framed by the wooden structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the cushions and the decorative lattice pattern on the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid wooden backrest and the open, lattice-style frame beneath the seat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the cushion depth and lattice frame detail.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a solid, rectangular panel upholstered in light fabric, extending the full width of the seat. It is straight and unsegmented, with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are open with only the wooden frame forming a low boundary.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and integrated into the wooden frame, finished in a natural wood tone with a simple, robust design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, light-colored fabric with a smooth, untextured appearance and no visible patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, rectangular cushions: one for the seat and one for the backrest, both attached and aligned with the frame, providing a clean and minimal arrangement.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
